elements.title: ZTF J1239+8347
elements.contents: ... that ZTF J1239+8347 (pictured) consists of two brown dwarfs orbiting so closely that material flows between them?

elements.title: Rollo Peters
elements.contents: ... that actor and designer Rollo Peters helped transform a barn into a professional theater?

elements.title: The Shikoku Shimbun
elements.contents: ... that The Shikoku Shimbun, which published numerous articles about video game addiction, also published an advertisement that says "don't just study, play some games"?

elements.title: Gaming
elements.contents: ... that the Genshin Impact character Gaming was used to promote the art of lion dancing in China?

elements.title: a Kanye West song originally titled "Gas Chambers"
elements.contents: ... that a Kanye West song originally titled "Gas Chambers" made the UK and US charts in April 2026?

elements.title: Shlomo Erell
elements.contents: ... that Shlomo Erell participated in an attack on Hitler's yacht before being appointed the commander of the Israeli Navy?

elements.title: The Behavior of Law
elements.contents: ... that The Behavior of Law argues that people of higher social status are more likely to use the law than people of lower status?

elements.title: a raja of Kolhapur
elements.contents: ... that "Today is the first time I have seen snow falling" were the last words written by a raja of Kolhapur in his diary?

elements.title: Three Rivers Museum
elements.contents: ... that the Three Rivers Museum holds an annual event titled "Polar Express Pajama Party"?
